channel.title: Programming on 郝鸿涛：Hongtao Hao
channel.description: Recent content in Programming on 郝鸿涛：Hongtao Hao

item.title: zsh: command not found: brew
item.description: I saw this post on Stackoverflow. This answer is mostly correct but it omits lots of details. For example, I don’t have a .zshrc file in the begining, how do I create it first. After entering export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH", how do I save and exit? This post is to help solve this problem. First of all, open your Terminal. If you don’t have a .zshrc file, input touch .zshrc Then, input
